user.title: Add Web Monitor
user.description: Configure a new web page monitor. After creating, use the Web Monitor panel to browse to the page and select the element to watch.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Force an immediate scraping run for a monitor.

get_history.name: Get History
get_history.description: Retrieve the change history for a monitor.

monitor_id.name: Monitor ID
monitor_id.description: The monitor to get history for.

limit.name: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return.

clear_history.name: Clear History
clear_history.description: Delete all history entries for a monitor.

monitor_id.name: Monitor ID
monitor_id.description: The monitor to clear history for.
